mapper.update: UPDATE routes r SET -- 点赞数：查likes表，target_type=3 like_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_type = 3 AND l.target_id = r.id ), collect_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM collections c WHERE c.target_type = 3 AND c.target_id = r.id ), comment_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments cm WHERE cm.target_type = 3 AND cm.target_id = r.id AND cm.status = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT *, -- 计算加权综合得分：点赞×0.5 + 收藏×0.3 + 评论×0.2，重命名为composite_score (like_count * 0.5 + collect_count * 0.3 + comment_count * 0.2) AS composite_score FROM routes WHERE status = 1 -- 仅查询状态为1的记录 ORDER BY composite_score DESC -- 取得分最高的前5条 LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM routes WHERE status = 1 -- 仅查询状态为1的记录 ORDER BY created_at ASC;
SELECT * FROM routes WHERE status = 1 -- 仅查询状态为1的记录 ORDER BY created_at DESC;
SELECT * FROM routes WHERE status = 1 -- 仅查询状态为1的记录 ORDER BY (like_count * 0.5 + collect_count * 0.3 + comment_count * 0.2)ASC;
SELECT * FROM routes WHERE status = 1 -- 仅查询状态为1的记录 ORDER BY (like_count * 0.5 + collect_count * 0.3 + comment_count * 0.2)DESC;
SELECT r.*, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments c WHERE c.target_type = 3 AND c.target_id = r.id AND c.status = 1) AS comment_count FROM routes r WHERE r.id = #{id}
